arguments.script:
import json
import unreal
actor = unreal.EditorLevelLibrary.spawn_actor_from_class(unreal.StaticMeshActor, unreal.Vector(480.0, 120.0, 120.0), unreal.Rotator(0.0, 0.0, 0.0))
actor.set_actor_label('UEBridgeMCP_SearchActor_20260423_214405')
actor.tags = [unreal.Name('UEBridgeMCP_SearchRound1')]
mesh = unreal.load_asset('/Engine/BasicShapes/Cube.Cube')
comp = actor.get_component_by_class(unreal.StaticMeshComponent)
if comp and mesh:
    comp.set_static_mesh(mesh)
    comp.set_collision_profile_name('BlockAll')
print(json.dumps({'label': actor.get_actor_label(), 'name': actor.get_name(), 'tags': [str(t) for t in actor.tags]}))
